\tzpentry{ID4808}{Coupled Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4808 introduces Coupled Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\mathcal{L}[\\rho] = -i[\\hat{H}, \\rho] + \\sum \\gamma_j \\mathcal{D}[\\hat{L}_j, \\rho]\n\\end{equation}
